ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: The 'ggplot2' package provides simple functions for visualizing contours of 2-d kernel density estimates. 'ggdensity' implements several additional density estimators as well as more interpretable visualizations based on highest density regions instead of the traditional height of the estimated density surface.

The 'ggplot2' package provides simple functions for visualizing contours of 2-d kernel density estimates. 'ggdensity' implements several additional density estimators as well as more interpretable visualizations based on highest density regions instead of the traditional height of the estimated density surface.

name: r-ggdensity
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "1.0.1" %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-ggdensity
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/ggdensity_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/ggdensity/ggdensity_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 4ce2fda3bbc116bc9a985ac2aa52c7588354e680aa8eecba5925b68d11194dea

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-mass
    - r-ggplot2
    - r-isoband
    - r-scales
    - r-tibble
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-mass
    - r-ggplot2
    - r-isoband
    - r-scales
    - r-tibble

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('ggdensity')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('ggdensity')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://jamesotto852.github.io/ggdensity/
  license: MIT
  summary: The 'ggplot2' package provides simple functions for visualizing contours of 2-d kernel density estimates. 'ggdensity' implements several additional density estimators as well as more interpretable visualizations based on highest density regions instead of the traditional height of the estimated density 
    surface.
  license_family: MIT
  license_file:
    - {{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/MIT
    - LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
